nodes.context: A yakuza organization in Japan, the largest such syndicate.
A yakuza gang, a subsidiary of Yamaguchi-gumi.
A yakuza organization, possibly a subsidiary or related group.

edges.evidence_quote: Kaneyoshi Kuwata ... was a yakuza gang member, the fifth generation wakagashira of the Yamaguchi-gumi , was the third kumicho of the Yamaken-gumi yakuza gang
edges.context: Yamaken-gumi is a subsidiary or sub-group of Yamaguchi-gumi, as Kuwata held leadership roles in both.

edges.evidence_quote: Kaneyoshi Kuwata ... was the third kumicho of the Yamaken-gumi yakuza gang, and second generation kaicho of Kenryu-kai
edges.context: Kenryu-kai is likely a subsidiary or related group to Yamaguchi-gumi, as Kuwata held leadership roles in both.
